name: Bostwick GA
description: Bostwick GA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bishop, GA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Herman C. Michael Park
description: Come play pickleball at Herman C. Michael Park in Bishop, GA! There are 5 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Membership required for indoor courts - $10  each time you play for out of county players

name: Hill Park
description: Hill Park is a place to play pickleball in Madison, GA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Morgan County Rec Indoor Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Morgan County Rec Indoor Gym in Madison, GA! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
fees:
Fee required — $2 in county
$4 out of county

name: Rutledge Veterans Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rutledge Veterans Park in Rutledge, GA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
